answer_en:
Pterygopalatine Ganglion
Contains the cell bodies of postganglionic parasympathetic neurons (innervating the lacrimal gland, salivary glands in the palate, and mucous glands in the nasal cavity)

details: Contains the cell bodies of postganglionic parasympathetic neurons (innervating the lacrimal gland, salivary glands in the palate, and mucous glands in the nasal cavity)

title: Sagittal Section of Nasal Cavity (Right Side)
subtitle: (Conchae and Perpendicular Plate of Palatine Bone Removed to Expose Pterygopalatine Fossa)
